message:
fix: add tool dependency check for AI agents and sync settings UI with registry (#9494)

Fixes #9487, Fixes #9488

Issue 9487: Add a pre-launch readiness check in ClaudeCodeProvider that
verifies required CLI binaries (kubectl, helm, git, gh) are available in
PATH via exec.LookPath before spawning the CLI subprocess. Returns a
clear ToolDependencyError listing missing tools so operators get
actionable guidance instead of cryptic mid-mission failures.

Issue 9488: The settings UI API key modal now sources its provider list
from the backend's live agent registry instead of a hardcoded frontend
map. The GET /settings/keys response includes a new registeredProviders
field populated from the singleton Registry. The frontend filters
displayed keys against this list and falls back to showing all backend
keys when registry data is unavailable (older kc-agent versions).
Removed stale PROVIDER_INFO entries for unregistered API-only and IDE
providers (claude, openai, gemini, cursor, vscode, windsurf, cline,
jetbrains, zed, continue, raycast) that were never matched by backend
data.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
